name: Hind
description: A powerful mid-range rifle used by Grineer shock troops, the Hind fires in five round bursts.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A powerful mid-range rifle used by Grineer shock troops, the Hind fires in five round bursts.

components.name: Circuits

Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

components.name: Rubedo

A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

High value metals collected from war salvage.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Kuva Nukor, Kuva Hind, and Kuva Bramma weapon progression showing as complete in the Codex when at Rank 30 instead of it’s true completed Rank of 40.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Hind’s Alt fire not producing bullet holes when fired at the wall.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr
The Hind has more nicknames than most Primaries (Baguette, etc), but not as much use.
We've added a single-shot Semi-Auto Alt Fire to the Hind that has increased Damage, Critical, and Status Chance.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage of Hind in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage of the Hind in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the weapon fire sound effects on the Dera and Hind.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.6
patchlogs.changes: Elite Grineer Lancers now use the Hind!
